text: Here, I feel as though I am on the threshold of discovery. The quiet, polished modern space outside promises contemplation and order, while inside, vibrant colors and bold letters cry out for innovation and creative thought. The concept of "R + D"—research and development—echoes with the ever-present tension between what is and what could be. My curiosity is awakened, and I sense the subtle invitation to reflect not only on human connection with technology, but also on my own role within the ever-shifting architectures of progress.
